global_description: A small, slender bird with a streamlined body, predominantly grayish-brown plumage. It features a short, conical bill and a distinctive yellow streak above the eye. The wings and tail are short, with subtle streaks and a slightly rounded shape.

part_details.plumage: Grayish-brown with subtle streaks, providing camouflage in marshy environments.
part_details.bill: Short, conical, dark gray, suited for seed and insect foraging.
part_details.eye_streak: Bright yellow line above the eye, contrasting with the darker head.
part_details.wings: Short, rounded, with faint streaks, aiding in agile flight.
part_details.tail: Short, slightly rounded, matching the wing coloration.

spatial_relations: The yellow streak is positioned above the eye, enhancing visibility.
The short bill is centrally located on the face, below the eye streak.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body, slightly rounded at the tips.
The tail extends from the rear, complementing the wing shape.
